title: ervum volubile
intro: Ervum volubile, also known as the Indian vetch or field bean, is a leguminous plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ervum volubile include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit cardio-protective effects. Ervum volubile can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
